heading: Repeal of prior legislation; exception
label: 163 Repeal of prior legislation; exception
text: Chapters 6 and 7 of this title, providing for mediation, conciliation, and arbitration, and all Acts and parts of Acts in conflict with the provisions of this chapter are repealed, except that the members, secretary, officers, employees, and agents of the Railroad Labor Board, in office on , shall receive their salaries for a period of 30 days from such date, in the same manner as though this chapter had not been passed.May 20, 1926
notes: References in TextChapters 6 and 7 of this title, referred to in text, were in the original references to the act of , and title III of the Transportation Act, 1920, respectively.July 15, 1913
